response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad web, mobile, and some embedded/DLang experience, but lacks the core requirements for this role: no native Japanese proficiency (critical hard requirement), no demonstrated C development on UNIX in recent years (only a brief NI stint in 2014-2015), no Linux kernel modification experience, and no background in network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) or LAN switch/embedded networking. The skill set is misaligned with embedded firmware security work.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and testing focus
Some low-level/systems experience (DLang async I/O, C/C++ at National Instruments, wave field synthesis with Linux/Jack)
Polyglot engineer comfortable picking up new tools and technologies
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency — hard requirement not met
No Linux kernel investigation or source modification experience
No experience with network security (MACsec, 802.1X), switch chips, or embedded firmware development

key_factors.factor: Lack of Linux kernel and C/UNIX embedded experience
No network security / LAN switch domain background
